creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Excuse me, which patch got your approval?  And how about other Twisted
patches?  Indeed, I really want you can approve this one:

http://people.freebsd.org/~lwhsu/twisted_20081230.diff

Sorry for your inconvenience.

On Sun, Jan 11, 2009 at 23:40:07 +0000, Neal Nelson wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/130262; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: Neal Nelson <neal@nelson.name>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
> Cc:  
> Subject: Re: ports/130262: [Update] devel/py-twistedCore 2.5.0 to 8.2.0
> Date: Mon, 12 Jan 2009 10:20:01 +1100
> 
>  Please go ahead with this patch.
>  
>  Thanks.
>  
>  On 2009-01-07, at 23:00 , Edwin Groothuis wrote:
>  
>  > Maintainer of devel/py-twistedCore,
>  >
>  > Please note that PR ports/130262 has just been submitted.
>  >
>  > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>  > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>  > and a committer will take care of it.
>  >
>  > The full text of the PR can be found at:
>  >    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/130262
>  >
>  > -- 
>  > Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
>  > edwin@FreeBSD.org
>  >
>  > !DSPAM:4964989e305695209328925!
>  >
>

Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu AT FreeBSD.org>
